landing.tagline: Build your room. Back your picks. Chase the table.
landing.title: The control room for Leagues and Tournament predictions.
landing.description: Create private groups, draft scorelines, lock one pick per league, and let live results redraw the leaderboard instantly.

gameLoop.label: Game loop
gameLoop.text: Draft picks, submit once, rise by points.

socialPlay.label: Social play
socialPlay.text: Invite-code groups for friends, offices, or fan clubs.

adminScoring.label: Admin scoring
adminScoring.text: Results update standings as soon as matches are finalized.

landing.step1Title: Create or join a prediction room
landing.step1Desc: Spin up a private league and share the invite code with your group.
landing.step2Desc: Experiment freely, then mark one prediction set as your live selection.
landing.step3Title: Watch the table move after every result
landing.step3Desc: Exact scores and correct outcomes convert into leaderboard points automatically.
landing.socialProof: 1,284 prediction sets locked in this week
landing.peekTitle: A peek inside a live group

signIn.heroDesc: Private leagues, group invites, one locked submission per room, and a live table that moves with every result.
signIn.heroProvidersText: Google, Facebook, or secure email-password access.
signIn.formDesc: Use email and password for local access, or connect an OAuth provider to enter the full dashboard.
signIn.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
signIn.signInFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.
signIn.accountCreated: Account created. Sign in with your email and password.

resetPassword.checkEmail: Check your email for the reset link.
resetPassword.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated successfully.

nav.tagline: League and Tournament predictions, group rivalry, and live scoring in one control room.

tournamentSwitcher.label: Tournament
tournamentSwitcher.switchHint: Switch tournament context for groups, predictions, fixtures, and scoring.

dashboard.title: Your group pulseboard.
dashboard.subtitle: Track rankings, locked picks, and tournament context at a glance.
dashboard.performanceTitle: How you are doing in your groups
dashboard.noPrediction: No prediction submitted in this group yet.
dashboard.noGroupPerformanceDesc: Join or create a group in the selected tournament to start tracking rank and points here.
dashboard.feedEmptyTitle: No stored articles for this tournament
dashboard.feedEmptyDesc: Sync the newsroom after configuring a provider key and tournament tags.
dashboard.feedSetupDesc: Add clean, broad tags to tournaments now, such as competition name, governing body, and host country or year.

groups.title: Build rivalries, not spreadsheets.
groups.subtitle: Create tournament-specific leagues, join with invite codes, and control which room gets which locked prediction.
groups.createGroupNote: This group will be created for the tournament currently selected in the header.
groups.noGroups: No groups yet. Create one or join an existing room to start competing.
groups.notMember: You are not a member of that group.
groups.loadError: Unable to load groups. Are you signed in?
groups.joinError: Could not join group. Check your invite code.

groupDetail.noSubmission: You have not submitted a prediction to this group yet.
groupDetail.confirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave this group?

groupRoom.notSubmittedYet: You haven't submitted a prediction yet
groupRoom.nameUpdateError: Could not update the group name.
groupRoom.noSubmissionsYet: No submissions yet — be the first!
groupRoom.finalizedDesc: The final standings are in. See how you did.
groupRoom.draftSavedDesc: for {stageName} — don't forget to submit before the deadline.
groupRoom.noStageOpenDesc: Predictions will open when the next stage begins.
groupRoom.stagePredictionsDesc: Pick your qualifying teams and match winners stage by stage.
groupRoom.inactiveTitle: You are inactive in this group.
groupRoom.inactiveDesc: Contact a group admin to be activated.
groupRoom.allowLateDesc: Optionally lock matches this member cannot pick. Locked matches earn no points — a penalty for submitting late.
groupRoom.allowLateNoMatches: This member will be allowed to submit their missing prediction after the deadline.
groupRoom.allowLateLockedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No matches locked} one {# match locked} other {# matches locked}}

audit.noSubmissions: This member has no staged predictions yet.

stagedPredictions.noStages: No stages found for this tournament.
stagedPredictions.lockedIn: Your picks are locked in. Contact a group admin to unlock.
stagedPredictions.pick32Title: Pick the {count} teams you think will qualify.
stagedPredictions.pick32Desc: The top 2 from each group advance, plus 8 best third-place finishers.
stagedPredictions.fullMessage: {total} teams selected — deselect a team to change your pick.
stagedPredictions.pickWinners: Pick the winner for each match.
stagedPredictions.lockedMatchNote: Locked — this match earns no points (late-submission penalty)
stagedPredictions.unlockedNotice: An admin unlocked your prediction — review your picks and submit again before the deadline.
stagedPredictions.lateSubmissionNotice: An admin gave you a one-time window to submit this round's picks late. Make your picks and submit before they close it.
stagedPredictions.confirmResubmit: Submitting will lock your picks again. Continue?
stagedPredictions.tieBreakerDesc: Answer these questions for extra points in case of a tie.
stagedPredictions.tieBreakerClosedDesc: Tie-breaker submissions have been closed by the admin.
stagedPredictions.resultsProvisional: Results update live and may change until this stage is finalized.
stagedPredictions.resultsNotStarted: Your picks are in — results haven't started yet.
stagedPredictions.groupStagePending: Your picks are locked in — they'll be marked correct or incorrect once the group stage is scored.

predictions.title: {tournament} sheet.
predictions.subtitle: Fill the active tournament like a prediction sheet: group matches, standings, knockout bracket, and final tie-breakers.
predictions.teamsNotDecided: Teams not yet decided — predict who you think will advance.
predictions.notSubmitted: Not submitted to any group yet.
predictions.noTournament: No active tournament is configured yet.
predictions.incompleteStandings: Incomplete standings in: {groups}. Fill all positions or leave the entire group blank.
predictions.duplicateTeam: Group {group}: the same team is selected at multiple positions.

wizard.groupStandingsHint: Set your predicted standings for each group. Top 2 advance directly, 3rd may qualify via best third-place.
wizard.dragHint: Drag to reorder on desktop · Use ▲▼ arrows on mobile
wizard.thirdPlaceHint: Rank all third-place teams by predicted performance. The top 8 advance to the Round of 32.
wizard.pickWinner: Click a team to pick your winner for each match.
wizard.nameRequired: Please enter a name for your prediction.
wizard.completeGroups: Complete all group standings before continuing.
wizard.completeThirdPlace: Rank all third-place teams before continuing.
wizard.completeKnockout: Pick a winner for every match before continuing.
wizard.doneDesc: Your picks are locked in. Submit to a group room to compete on the leaderboard.
wizard.tieBreakersHint: These questions are used to break ties on the leaderboard. Answer as precisely as you can — closest guess wins.
wizard.completeTieBreakers: Answer all tie-breaker questions before continuing.

profile.title: Your account card.
profile.subtitle: Review your account details, update the display name, and keep your identity clean across groups and leaderboards.
profile.uploadNote: Optional. JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 2MB. Google/Facebook sign-in uses the provider photo automatically.
profile.passwordNote: Leave the password fields empty if you only want to update your profile details.
profile.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

tips.0: Lock a selected prediction before matchday starts so your group submission is ready when the room fills up.
tips.1: Use separate drafts to test safe picks versus upset-heavy brackets before choosing your live submission.
tips.2: Tournament context drives groups, fixtures, and picks, so confirm the selected tournament before editing anything.
tips.3: Exact scorelines usually separate the top of the table, not just correct winners.
tips.4: If you run a private pool, keep results updated quickly so the leaderboard stays meaningful after every match.

badges.sectionSubtitle: Achievements you've earned across your groups.
badges.empty: No badges yet — submit your predictions and climb your group to start earning.

ever_present.name: Ever-Present
ever_present.desc: Submitted predictions in every stage of {tournamentName}.

locked_in.name: Locked In
locked_in.desc: Finished {tournamentName} without using a single unlock.

matchCenter.title: Results
matchCenter.subtitle: Every World Cup match — scores, cards, and what's still to come.
